message:
fix(crypto): pass binary data as Uint8Array instead of strings in JS crypto shim

The hash, HMAC, and timingSafeEqual hostcalls were converting binary
data to strings before crossing the JS-Rust boundary, silently
corrupting non-UTF-8 bytes. Switch all data paths to Uint8Array /
TypedArray<u8> for correct binary hashing. Add combineChunks() and
toUint8Array() JS helpers for chunk accumulation.

Also add signed integer read/write methods to the Buffer shim
(readInt16LE/BE, readInt32LE/BE, writeInt8, writeInt16LE/BE,
writeInt32LE/BE) for extension compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
